codeReview.summary: WorkGraph DAG implementation is comprehensive and production-ready. The module includes: WorkGraph struct with HashMap<Uuid, WorkGraphNode> nodes and Vec<(Uuid, Uuid)> edges; rich node metadata (status, status_color, complexity_weight, spec_links, agent_session_ids, code_change_refs, test_result_refs, timestamps); deterministic JSON serialization via serialize_ordered_map/serialize_ordered_edges helpers; full cycle detection; Kahn's algorithm topological_sort; root_nodes and leaf_nodes queries; 26 unit tests all passing; clippy clean with no warnings.

summary: Feature orch-work-graph-data PASSES scrutiny. The implementation at crates/swell-orchestrator/src/work_graph.rs is a complete DAG data model with rich node metadata, deterministic JSON serialization (important for external visualization tools), cycle detection preventing invalid DAGs, topological ordering via Kahn's algorithm, and 26 comprehensive tests covering all expected behaviors. No MockLlm or test doubles in production code paths. The work_graph module is properly exported from lib.rs (line 59: pub mod work_graph; line 208+: pub use work_graph::{WorkGraph, WorkGraphNode, NodeMetadata, ...}). Tests pass and clippy is clean.
